title: Naan Poondamalli Lyrics Thadaiyara Thaakka Songs Lyrics
singerName: Arun Vijay, L R Eswari, Solar Sai
stanzas:
Song: Poondamalli
Singers: Arun Vijay, L R Eswari, Solar Sai
Lyrics: Vaali

Naan poondhamallithaan, per puspavallithaan
Enna kavuthuputa romba peru kadana sollithaan ..(2)

Enna kaadhalichaanga, vandu kadavirichaanga
naan vaada kaatha kilichi pota vaazha kannunga

Yakkaa yakkaa thaan, Aalu pakkaa thaan
Naalum vitta gaali, Ninurupa pakkathaan

Vandhan kabaali, Vachaan kabaali
Sholi mudinjadhuna Vittuputta savaari

Naan poondhamalli thaan thaan
Per pushpa vallithaan
Enna kavuthuputa romba Peru kadana sollithaan .

Adhu andha kaalanga palaya kolanga
Ippa paludhu paarka
aalilaadha palaya paalanga

Ye vaadipatti, minor vandi katti
Vandhu atha itha tharrenaaru asala .

Kozhi koovayile, avaru povayile
naan vachirundhen vethalapotiya tharala

Ye andha pattu vendhuduma indha sattiyila
Yen karpa naanum pooti vachen tentu pottiyila

Naan thottuputA suttupudum
vatta nilla da
Ye chinna pasanga kanni vachaa
sikidaadha puraa da

Oosi illaama, noolu, illaama
enga ullangala thacheeru
Kaayam aagaama, kannu noogaama
naanga aalukonnu kondaal enna ichinu
Enga akka sonna ellathukum ok naan

Naan poondhamallithaan, per puspavallithaan
Enna kavuthuputa romba peru kadana sollithaan

ha Dandanaka dan dan enna davadacha kan
ada onnaa rendaa appa naanum vayasu ponnuthaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Naan Poondamalli'?

The song celebrates love and the joy of life, showcasing the playful and energetic vibe of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of 'Naan Poondamalli' in the movie?

In Thadayara Thaaka, the song highlights a festive moment where the characters express their love and happiness through dance and music.

Who are the singers of 'Naan Poondamalli'?

The song features the talented voices of Arun Vijay, L R Eswari, and Solar Sai.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Naan Poondamalli' was composed by Thaman S, known for his energetic and catchy tunes.

When was 'Naan Poondamalli' released?

The song was released on May 13, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Naan Poondamalli', the characters revel in the joy of love and celebration, perfectly encapsulating the lively spirit of Thadayara Thaaka. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics invite listeners to dance along, making it a perfect party anthem. The collaboration between Arun Vijay, L R Eswari, and Solar Sai adds a unique charm to the track. Overall, the song conveys a sense of happiness and exuberance, leaving a lasting impression on its audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Poondamalli from Thadayara Thaaka is a vibrant celebration of love and life, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Arun Vijay, L R Eswari, and Solar Sai. With Thaman S's catchy beats and Vaali's clever lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy and joy that makes this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: I am Poondamalli, a great flower. They say my beauty is very famous.
Those who love me have come and captured me. If I sing, the girls will be enchanted.
It's all about the game, and the people are watching. Even if the wind blows, you are still beside me.
When they come, they are like a celebration. When they leave, it's like a ride that has ended.
Sister, this is how it always is, crying out loud.
I am Poondamalli, a great flower. They say my beauty is very famous.
Those old days are gone. Now, when I look, I see the old things that are not there anymore.
What is this fuss? They brought a minor vehicle and just left it here.
In the chicken coop, they didn't leave. I stayed there, waiting for the ghost to come.
Do you want this song in this situation? I have put my thoughts in a pot.
I will roll around and make a circle. These little kids can't handle it.
Without a thread, without a string, our hearts are connected. If we get together, what will happen to us?
Whatever my sister says, I will agree to everything.
I am Poondamalli, a great flower. They say my beauty is very famous.
Oh, what a fuss! What is this? I am still young, just like a girl.
